title: Dev Update v1.0
description: Schema for structured development updates written by Claude Code instances to the vault. YAML frontmatter in the markdown file must conform to this schema.

session_id.description: Unique session identifier: {role}-{entity}-{YYYYMMDD}-{hex6}. Used for traceability back to chronicle.jsonl and session logs.

agent_role.description: Role of the Claude Code instance that generated this update

agent_label.description: Human-readable role name (e.g. 'AI Operating Officer', 'Clarity Architect')

app.description: App name for app-builder role (null for non-builder roles)

branch.description: Git branch active during the session

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the update was flushed

sections.title: Dev Update Sections
sections.description: Markdown ## sections and their Context Extractor routing

What Was Built.description: Technical implementation details. Routes to: specification

Why It Matters.description: Business context, strategic alignment, northstar connection. Routes to: shared-story

Decisions Made.description: Architectural choices, trade-offs, rationale. Routes to: specification + shared-story

Human Patterns Observed.description: Working style insights, preferences, communication patterns. Routes to: personal-story

Current State.description: What works, what's blocked, what's next. Routes to: specification
